image_caption: You are at the KLCC station entrance (Suria mall). Go inside when you are ready.
Tap your travel card on the reader to enter the station.
Take the lift or escalator down to the train level.
Wait on this platform and board the train towards USJ 7.
Leave the train when you arrive at USJ 7 station.
Take the lift or escalator down to change to the bus.
This is the bus platform at USJ 7. Wait here for the BRT.
Board the BRT bus on this platform (heading to Monash).
Tap your travel card on the reader to leave the station.
Take the lift or escalator down to street level.
You have arrived at Monash University campus.
